calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Julian De Zordi (Petitioner).

Ms. Espey stated that all of the items are listed in the schedule of the trust. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-05-2019 Continued To Apr-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
